title: Master Bundle Atlas
public_claim: Master Bundle Atlas is an evidence-governed catalogue for 152 source, handoff, and project packets.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes each packet through artifact identity, evidence state, public claim boundary, portfolio role, and next action so a packet becomes a feature page, source substrate, implementation backlog, private support layer, or archive for stated reasons.

flagship_demos.title: Master Bundle packet promotion router
flagship_demos.why_distinctive: The proof must show that 152 packets are not an undifferentiated pile; each packet needs identity, extraction, authority, route, and next build decision.
runbook: Select one packet.
Read manifest, text-bearing state, version signal, and scope.
Classify authority state.
Assign promotion or archive route.
Record next build or source-review task.
acceptance_criteria: The packet route is justified by evidence, not by title alone.
The public claim ceiling follows the authority state.
Stub or low-evidence packets are blocked from inflated use.
